title: lepidium pedicellosum
intro: Lepidium pedicellosum, also known as Pedicellus or Southern peppergrass, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Lepidium pedicellosum include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
